free_text: Microscopic Integral Cross Section Measurements in
the Be(d,n) Neutron Spectrum for Applications in
Neutron Dosimetry, Radiation Damage and the
Neutron spectrum from 7-MeV deuterons on a
thick Be-metal target near zero degree. Energy (E) in
Flux is normalized to unit total fluence.
